prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学为推荐偏热；土木建筑、生化环材等为明显劝退。山西省2026年物理类考生约167419人，较2025年减少约5928人（-3.4%），考生规模小幅缩减；省控线数据2026年缺失，；兰州大学位于甘肃省兰州市，距山西省较远，属西北地区985高校；该校在山西省理科招生规模约130人左右，是西北地区在晋招生最多的985之一，地域偏好对山西考生报考意愿影响中性偏正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13425名、2026年小幅缩招2.2%（推高位次数字增大）、物理类考生减少3.4%（推低位次数字减小）、声誉偏正面（推低位次数字减小）及"大小年"波动规律（2025年为后移大年，2026年有回调可能），预计2026年最低位次较2025年略有前移；预测最低位次约13197名，区间12697–13697名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were 7212 → 12922 → 11268 → 6968 → 13425, showing significant volatility. In 2022, due to a gap, it dropped sharply to 12922, rebounded to 6968 in 2024, and then fell again to 13425 in 2025, exhibiting alternating 'big year, small year' patterns in recent years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 13425. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shanxi Province was 125 in 2021, 123 in 2022, 120 in 2023, 122 in 2024, and 136 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 133, a decrease of 3 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 2.2%, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a directly affiliated 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university under the Ministry of Education. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 40th on the main list, with recent rankings stable in the 38–40 range, placing it in the mid-tier 985 level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat positive, mainly due to a master's graduate thanking the security department in their acknowledgments for allowing a waste-picking elderly person to enter the campus, demonstrating humanistic care and receiving widespread positive coverage. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 53rd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at a medium level among 985 universities, and no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, it achieved A+ in Grass Science and Ecology, A- in Chemistry, Geography, and Biology, totaling five disciplines at A- or above. Grass Science and Ecology are top-tier nationally, while basic disciplines like Chemistry and Biology are strong, providing strong appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology are recommended as relatively popular. Civil Engineering, Architecture, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shanxi Province is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (-3.4%) from 2025, a slight reduction in candidate scale. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou, Gansu Province, relatively far from Shanxi Province, and is a 985 university in the northwest region. Its enrollment scale in Shanxi Province for science is about 130, making it one of the 985 universities with the largest enrollment from the northwest in Shanxi. Regional preference has a neutral to slightly positive impact on Shanxi candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13425, a slight enrollment reduction of 2.2% in 2026 (pushing the ranking number higher), a 3.4% decrease in physics category examinees (pushing the ranking number lower), a somewhat positive reputation (pushing the ranking number lower), and the 'big year, small year' fluctuation pattern (2025 was a big year with a backward shift, and 2026 may see a correction), it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13197, with a range of 12697–13697.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Electronic Information (Including Base Class)
- Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Integrated Circuit Design and Application Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Basic Medicine
- Preventive Medicine (Smart Health Innovation Class)
- Pharmacy
- Business Administration (Including Base Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 12697–13697, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower end of the range), and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. Popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information require higher rankings; candidates with rankings within 13000 are advised to consider them seriously. Medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Basic Medicine have relatively lower ranking requirements, suitable for candidates in the middle to lower part of the range.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were 1334 → 1292 → 3142 → 1241 → 1691 respectively. In 2023, due to a gap, it significantly dropped to 3142, while other years fluctuated within the 1241–1691 range. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1691. The enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Shanxi Province was 27 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 30 in 2024, and 26 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 28, an increase of 2 from 2025, a slight expansion of about 7.7%, which alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a directly affiliated 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university under the Ministry of Education. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 40th on the main list, with stable rankings in the 38–40 range in recent years, placing it in the mid-tier 985 level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly due to the widespread dissemination of a humanities event where a master's graduate thanked the security department. On Douyin, it ranks 53rd in overall popularity (relatively hot), with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it achieved A+ in Grass Science and Ecology, A- in Chemistry, Geography, and Biology. Although liberal arts disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature and History did not receive A-level ratings, the comprehensive university has a deep foundation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially recommended as slightly hot, while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shanxi Province is approximately 63,113, a significant decrease of about 21,766 (-25.6%) from 2025, markedly reducing the examinee scale and competition pressure. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou City, Gansu Province, relatively far from Shanxi Province. Its liberal arts enrollment scale in Shanxi is about 26–32 people, a medium scale. The attractiveness of 985 universities in the Northwest region to Shanxi examinees is generally stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1691, a slight 7.7% expansion in 2026 (pushing the ranking number higher), a significant 25.6% reduction in history category examinees (pushing the ranking number higher), and a slightly positive reputation (pushing the ranking number lower), the effect of the examinee scale reduction is significantly greater than the expansion effect. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1799, with a range of 1529–2069.
